programme.desc: Facing Waves discovers the incredible culture, and explores the amazing landscapes around Mazury, Poland.

programme.desc: Ice Fishing vs. Propane In this episode, Mike takes a long-time AmeriGas employee out ice fishing and then learns the ins and outs of the world of residential propane! Stay tuned for the end and see how many fish were caught!

programme.title: Surfing Lifestyle Ep107: Hawaii’s North Shore…A Battle For The World Title
programme.desc: For two Australian surfers from the Gold Coast, best friends Mick Fanning and Joel Parkinson, it's been a long year of competition before arriving in the tropical waters of Hawaii. They're poised to battle it out for first place on the Championship Tour and the honor of being the World Champion. The North Shore of the island of Oahu is home to some of the best waves on the planet, and none more notorious than the Banzai pipeline.

programme.title: Blue World Ep811: Jojo the Friendly Dolphin + Gator Hole Cave in the Turks Caicos Islands
programme.desc: Jonathan, Blue World's host, and his enitre family travel to the Turks Caicos Islands in search of a famous local celebrity—Jojo the friendly dolphin. Then Blue World explores a hidden cave—keeping an eye out for the alligators, for which it’s named!

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep209: Boating New York City’s Waters with Scientist Neil deGrasse Tyson as Tour Guide
programme.desc: Water Ways TV's host, Steven Bull, cruises the waters of New York City with Neil deGrasse Tyson as his personal tour guide.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep114: Shark Divers Part 2
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep124: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour from Xiamen, China
programme.desc: The UIM F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour heads to a new location, Xiamen, China, for Round 5 with the Grand Prix of Xiamen.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep312: World Sail Racing Tour + Cliff Diving + Canoe Team Challenge
programme.desc: Event Highlights from the RC44 Sailing World Tour Stop in Portoroz, Slovenia + Cliff Diving's 5 Basic Dives + The Sickline Canoeing Team Challenge from Canada.

programme.title: Xplash Ep104
programme.desc: Xplash brings you amazing action in, on, and near water. Today we'll take an airboat ride in Florida to check out alligators, wakeboard through Bangkok's floating marketplace, and begin with a stormy yacht ride in the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Escramble
programme.desc: In a time beyond and close to now... a vision was revealed. A vision of the very first dream of life. The dream of life before there was life. The dream that vapor dreams of becoming solid and falling to meet whatever will catch and hold it. Thus begins "ESCRAMBLE". Featuring Bjorn Leines, Terje Haakonsen, Mark Landvik, Wille Yli-Louma, Shaun White, Seth Huot, Gigi Rüf, Erik Leines, Bryan Iguchi, Chris Demolski and Jamie Lynn.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: 9191
programme.desc: 9191 is a sideways introspective into the bewildering snow-covered dreamscape of international time traveler and mystic of the shred - Gigi Rüf.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Isle Of Snow
programme.desc: Join us as we explore the snowboard world through the perspectives of the people who live it and have made it their lives follow their passions.

programme.title: The Manboys Movie
programme.desc: The boys are back with new friends and a brand new snowboard film. The Manboys Movie will definitely top your expectations. Featuring bangers from Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Craig McMorris, Jody Wachniak, Matt Belzile, Anto Chamberland, and Mark Sollors.

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Snowdance
programme.desc: Snowdance is a backcountry snowboarding film. Because even if you’ve never set foot in the backcountry, you can still be grateful that it’s there. Seven years and one pandemic since their fruition, The ManBoys roster still remains largely intact with Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Matt Belzile, Jody Wachniak, Beau Bishop Eric Jackson. Snowdance was filmed by Ben Webb, Connor Winton, Dave Craig, and Ryan Kenny.

programme.title: Air Time Podcast - Shin Campos
programme.desc: Shin, the timeless powder hound, has been an iconic presence since the late '80s. With a career spanning decades, he's not only witnessed, but lived through it all. From a gritty renegade in Whistler, crafting local videos with his homies, to scaling the peaks of snowboarding stardom with Tree Top, Absinthe, Standard, White Out, and more. He briefly ventured into mountain guiding but a tragic incident led him to a new path. Today, Shin orchestrates cinematic magic behind the lens, skillfully managing and producing awe-inspiring commercial shoots that dominate the sea-to-sky landscapes. Although he's moved on from professional snowboarding, his passion remains unwavering. Shin's story epitomizes passion, resilience, and evolution. Enjoy the show!

programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1978, the Tour de France à la voile has allowed thousands of sailors to discover the French coast. This yachting race is held in July every year and links the English Channel to the French Riviera. The tour is a great offshore sailing school for amateur sailors, and a high-level competition for the great champions taking part.

programme.title: The Smoke that Thunders
programme.desc: In 1855, the Scottish explorer David Livingstone named the Victoria Falls after his reigning queen. However, the Kalolo-Lozi people had their own name for it: Mosi-oa-Tunya, “the smoke that thunders”.Staring down into the depths of the mighty Zambezi River from the top of the world’s largest waterfall, the Victoria Falls, world-class divers Orlando Duque and Jonathan Paredes prepare for the most challenging dive of their lives.Be part of their adventure as they dive into the largest waterfall in the world in The Smoke that Thunders, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Maxiboat TV Show - Episode 6
programme.desc: In the sixth episode of Maxiboat, we travel to the Cannes Yachting Festival 2021 for a very special show. On the programme: an exclusive interview with Nico Rosberg, former Formula 1 driver and new Sunreef multihull ambassador, a discovery of the new 2022 sailing boats and a visit on board the EVO v8, an incredible motoryacht from Italy. Also on the programme is the Hynova, a hydrogen-powered motorboat of the future, and the best moments of the Yachting Festival Elegance Contest.

programme.title: Jump On Board - Episode 9
programme.desc: Today we say goodbye to our skipper Giorgio, who is leaving us, and welcoming Marcos who will take us to Paros. As we approach the end of our trip, we start getting emotional and recall the best moments of this trip.

programme.title: European Dragon Championship

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2
programme.desc: In today's episode we will be visiting one of the most beautiful spots in Croatia and unknown for many. From historic sites to fabulous new modern spots, Korčula is certainly one of my favorite places in the world. With crystal clear sea this sun-drenched oasis also has plenty of water sports on offer. Get splashed into action with us!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the third episode of sun-drenched Sail-Ho Croatia! We are on the beautiful island of Hvar getting a little bit tipsy, but seriously the wine here is so good and so is the food. For the ultimate refreshment we have the appetizing crystal-clear sea around us, and we cannot refuse a dip in its warm waters.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we focus on the French team. They dominated the KiteFoil World Series scene, with many great performances. We’ll zoom in on Axel Mazella who clinched the Kitefoil European title and his second Kitefoil World title last season. Finally, we meet four-time World Champion, Daniela Moroz, who’ll share some tips for how to gybe in the best possible way.

programme.desc: A group of religious students drive into the remote wilderness to spend time with a religious sect and strengthen their bond with God. The three unsuspecting students film everything to document their experience but soon find themselves in the dark.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: Cut Her Out
programme.desc: Darcy can't purge her mind of the animalistic abuse she suffered as a child at the hands of her mother. Darcy's therapist Ryan discovers that her family homestead has been abandoned.

programme.title: Death Mask
programme.desc: Wilbur works in an old carnival and shows some gruesome things to the puplic. He covered his face because he had a sadistic father who burned his face. Everybody makes jokes about his scars and when the new boss fired him, he go to an old swamp-witch who gives him a peace of wood from a hanging tree and Wilbur makes a mask from this piece of wood and put all his anger in this mask. When he puts the mask on, everybody who looks on this mask commits suicide. He has created the Death-Mask.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E05 - Masters of Attack
programme.desc: Carnivores can't just pick their meals off trees. To survive, they have to use every trick they've got to catch food that's just as keen on staying alive as they are. If their prey hides, they have to find it. If it runs, they must chase it. They have to track it if it's hard to pin down and beat it if it fights back. The predator might use its strength for the final blow, but the real effort lies in the strategy.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E05 - Counting Shells
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers spend a lot of time enforcing the laws of waterfowl hunting; using canoes they work silently across the state's largest game area; it's not all work as one officer oversees a class trip to the pheasant field.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E06 - Shed Hunting
programme.desc: Looking for antlers on opening day is like Christmas for shed hunters; a few are willing to break the law for a crack at a monster shed; Montana wardens are on the look out for one offender who is no stranger to a run-in with the law.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E04 - Badge Bust and Beluga Whale
programme.desc: In 'Badge Bust,' one badge's over confidence gets another badge in trouble. Meanwhile, 'Beluga Whale' tells the story of a sea creature far from home that's quite the adventure.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E05 - North Coast and Seat Belt
programme.desc: Game Wardens take on one of the biggest cases ever in Ohio's Division of Wildlife's 146-year history. They must figure out what happened when a bunch of people break the law. In "Seat Belt," a routine traffic stop leads to a surprising find.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E03 - Deadman's Survival
programme.desc: Island Air battles time and the elements, to rescue a group trapped in Deadman's Bay.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E04 - Desperate Times
programme.desc: Island Air drops off a group of desperate hunters in the heart of the bush as a deep freeze hits Kodiak.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E39 - A Century Of The Queen Mother 100 Years In 100 Minutes
programme.desc: 100 years of celebration in 100 minutes

programme.title: Adam Ondra: Pushing the Limits
programme.desc: Climber Adam Ondra, best in his field, is known for his fearless, record-breaking ascents. An intimate portrait explores his life beyond the headlines

programme.title: Farewell Halong
programme.desc: For generations, the Nguyen family has lived on and off the water amid breathtaking natural scenery. Now they are threatened with forced resettlement.

programme.title: Floating
programme.desc: A lesbian bachelorette’s night out with "the guys", including, alas, her future sperm donor. A mumblecore comedy on a raft.

programme.title: Queen of Niendorf
programme.desc: In this celebration of childhood, a 10-year-old girl struggles to find her place in a 'boys' world.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Convinced that Victoria is not ready to fall in love again, Sergio doesn't want her to deceive herself, as if she cannot forget Nicolás, it is best that she stays away from him, but Victoria prevents this. Before leaving for his new life in another country, Hansen leaves instructions for Felipe to be in charge of the bank; Hansen hopes that Osuna will truly find her happiness; in the meantime, Adelaida bids farewell to her daughter with the same intention: for Victoria to be happy; Adelaida also asks Victoria to forgive her father. In Cantarrana, Genara is curious to know if Victoria would forgive her father, who has returned to the estate; devastated and remorseful for his actions; Victoria wants to forgive her father but doesn't know how. After discovering that Hilario visited Florencia, Nicolás confronts him in defense of his wife, but Guanipa assures him that he will be the one to take his woman away; at that moment, the heated argument is interrupted by Victoria.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: After finding Federico in the bushes looking for something, Victoria orders one of her peons to escort the young Alcoy to the hacienda Los Samanes; Victoria makes it clear that she is the one in charge of her land. Once Nicolás receives his uncles -Fernanda and Leopoldo- and his cousin Eugenia at Los Samanes hacienda, Federico enters the place escorted by Victoria's farmhands; the latter explains that young Alcoy not only threatened one of her men but also found him rummaging for something in Cantarrana. At nightfall, Genara tells Victoria that while she is pining for her beloved, Nicolás is preparing a party on the same land where he proposed to her; Victoria vows to take revenge on him.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena tries to send Alberto away, but he only seeks to break the ice and plays alluding to his childhood loves; provoking even more anger and jealousy in Guillermo, who remains threatening - Ricardo decides to hire the electrician services of María Bonita Echeverri, as a way to approach one of the four suspects with the same last name Echeverri of the theft of the check.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: At the party, fire is opened on the guests but Lorena puts a bulletproof vest on Marco Aurelio, saving his life. Guillermo, enraged, orders Lorena to kill him once and for all. Ricardo goes to report to his mother the result of his dealings with the second María Echeverri and finds Paulina with the bank statement showing the withdrawal of the million dollars.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: In front of the doctors, Pastora feigns interest in Clara Inés' condition, Clara grabs her arm forcefully, accusing her of what has happened to her.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: After coming to his senses, Dr. Bermudez explains to Clara Ines that he has a heart condition. Unexpectedly, Clara hears Elisa's screams.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia y María Amelia habían denunciado el crimen de la muerte de Leoncio. Torrealba las enfrenta pues quiere saber cómo fue que Rosa mató a Leoncio. Patricia, desesperada, bebe sin freno. Ante su descontrol, el detective, capcioso, duda de ella.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En las cartas que entregó Henry a Max, Rosa Blanco dice que le arrebataron a su hija y Camila, muy ansiosa, cree que, al fin sabrá por qué su mamá la abandonó. Marcelina encuentra la caja con las cartas y al saber el contenido, alterada, ordena que las quemen.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cartas contienen pruebas que incriminan a Patricia y a Fausto en el asesinato de Leoncio. Camila tomará decisiones importantes, sobre todo para encontrar las cuatro mujeres que traicionaron a su mamá. Fausto tiene una grave intención: hay que matar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel le confirma a Camila parte de los secretos que oculta: Patricia y su cuñada María Amelia fueron las que denunciaron a su madre. Luciano recibe un sobre que contiene la foto de Camila niña, con su vestidito amarillo, y detrás, una mujer protegiéndola.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel, insiste en que Rosa Blanco causará mucho daño a Camila. Poco lo que se sabe, sólo que por una llamada asegura que regresará para vengarse.

programme.title: Morirse En Domingo
programme.desc: Julio Salas muere tras una larga enfermedad, pero es domingo y su familia por dificultades económicas se ve forzada a contratar los servicios de una modesta agencia funeraria.

programme.title: Hienas
programme.desc: Luis ha metido la pata... hasta el fondo. Pero Pepe está ahí para ayudarlo... a caer. Ninguno de los dos tenía idea del grandísimo lío en el que andaban metidos ya desde hacía tiempo. Una liada de cojones.

programme.title: El Secreto Oculto
programme.desc: Describe los eventos del fin de los tiempos de la humanidad profetizada por místicos y Santos sobre los 3 días de oscuridad en que los demonios serán soldados ...

programme.title: Bendita Calamidad
programme.desc: Los hermanos Fayos, Anselmo y Ricardo, están con el agua al cuello. Su bar no funciona, el Ayuntamiento lo clausura y se ha agotado el dinero que, para ir tirando, solicitaron a unos prestamistas que no se andan con contemplaciones a la hora de cobrar. Piden consejo a un abogado poco amigo de la ley, Antonio Orestes, que les sugiere una vía rápida para acabar con sus problemas: El secuestro exprés de un constructor de Tarazona.

programme.title: Aerosol
programme.desc: El líder de una banda mexicana mata a un oponente en la guerra de pandillas en los 80's, por lo que huye a la ciudad de Los Ángeles, California. Dieciocho años después regresa al barrio sin un objetivo definido, sólo para encontrar a su hermano menor, involucrado en las pandillas de hoy. El crimen organizado utiliza niños para distribuir droga en los barrios. En combatir la corrupción y el crimen que hay en el barrio, Nuk encuentra un significado para su retorno y un camino para redimir las muertes que causó

programme.title: Fantasías
programme.desc: La historia de Brenda y Antonio, una pareja de clase media con dos hijos adolescentes y una vida sexual aburrida, en busca de nuevas experiencias, primero con su sexy sirvienta. Más tarde, siguiendo el consejo de Esther, una amiga mayor que tiene un estilo de vida swinger junto con su esposo, deciden explorar la posibilidad de despertar una nueva pasión al ligar con Miguel y Claudia, una pareja swinger. Pero luego llegan los problemas.

programme.title: Borrar de la Memoria
programme.desc: Una historia de amor se transforma en una historia de persecuciones y asesinatos sin esclarecer en el contexto de la masacre estudiantil de octubre de 1968. Más de 40 años después, un periodista tenaz se da a la tarea de aclarar los crímenes bajo condiciones muy peligrosas, con el objetivo de llevar la verdad ante la justicia. Ello representa un esfuerzo dedicado a obligar a un país a reconocer la negación de la reconciliación y el cierre de trágicos acontecimientos políticos y sociales en su historia.

programme.title: Amar
programme.desc: Carlos quiere pero Susana no. Joel no quiere pero Patricia lo obliga. Gabriel lo espera pero Martha no se lo da. Amado lo busca con una gringa y lo pierde. Benito lo tiene toda la vida. Concha se lo lleva más allá del sistema solar. Todos lo quieren y todos lo dan pero unos no lo reciben y otros quieren más. Así es Amar.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.
